channel.title: ios on lucaji
channel.description: Recent content in ios on lucaji

item.title: Antoine
item.description: The Little Prince Everybody shall be well acquainted with the story of the Little Prince. I personally really like to learn languages, and having the same text available in more than one language, the dual-language books, for example, where the left page is in the original draft, and the right hand one, is in a foreign language. I find this approach of being able to compare directly the two text - a Rosetta-Stone approach I would say - much more interesting and learning-prone.
